utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. travel_dates – present and fully specified (2024-07-01 to 2024-07-07).

6. additional_services – present with travel insurance info and special request, though no explicit cost is listed. The format requires 'with costs', so missing cost means not fully specified.

Therefore, 6 of 7 items are fully specified according to the format.
